title: Cool temperatures but clear skies on Thursday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, no weather warnings have been issued for Thursday 12 June.


> This is what you can expect:


Western CapePartly cloudy with morning fog patches over the western interior of the south coast including the southern Overberg region, otherwise fine and cold to cool.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate easterly to south-easterly reaching fresh to strong north of Saldanha Bay during the afternoon.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeMorning frost in the extreme north-eastern, otherwise fine and cold but cool alongthe coast.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly, becoming light southeasterly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and cold, but cool along the coast. Morning frost over the northern high ground, otherwise fine and cold, but cool along the coast.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly to northerly.


> Your expected temperatures:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
